label.text: I. Literary Analysis, Form and Theory

notes: Students must earn a grade of C or
higher in all courses toward major requirements. 15 credits in the
English major must be taken at Eastern CT State University.
ENG 100/100P may not be used as part of the English major.
All English Majors must declare a concentration, until one is declared the requirements shown
are that of the General English Studies concentration.

label.text: ENGLISH CAPSTONE OPTIONS - SELECT A, B, or C
English for Secondary Education Concentration Requirements
I. Literary Analysis, Form and Theory

notes: Students must earn a grade of C or
higher in all courses toward major requirements. 15 credits in the
English major must be taken at Eastern CT State University.
ENG 100/100P may not be used as part of the English major.
All English Majors must declare a concentration, until one is declared the requirements shown
are that of the General English Studies concentration.
Students must earn a grade of C or
higher in all courses toward major requirements, except ENG 299 and
ENG 487. For ENG 299 and ENG 487, students must recieve Credit. 15 credits
in the English major must be taken at Eastern CT State University.
ENG 100/100P may not be used as part of the English major.
Only one Independent Study (ENG 480, ENG 481) may be used to fulfill the
elective requirements. Independent Study courses that are assigned to
replace an active ENG course are an exception.
